name: html-presentation-js
description: A minimalist, Unix-philosophy HTML presentation library that toggles classes instead of using Virtual DOMs.

scripts.build: tsc && esbuild src/presentation.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/presentation.js --format=iife --global-name=PresentationWindow && esbuild src/presentation.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/presentation.min.js --format=iife --global-name=PresentationWindow && esbuild src/presentation.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/presentation.esm.js --format=esm
